name: Bystial Druiswurm
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>深淵の獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ビーステッド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ドルイドヴルム
desc: You can target 1 LIGHT or DARK monster in either GY; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand. This is a Quick Effect if your opponent controls a monster. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can target 1 Special Summoned monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Bystial Druiswurm" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can target 1 LIGHT or DARK monster in either GY; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand. This is a Quick Effect if your opponent controls a monster. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can target 1 Special Summoned monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Bystial Druiswurm" once per turn.
eff: You can target 1 LIGHT or DARK monster in either GY; banish it, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand. This is a Quick Effect if your opponent controls a monster. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can target 1 Special Summoned monster your opponent controls; send it to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Bystial Druiswurm" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: THE CHRONICLES DECK: The Fallen & The Virtuous (All-Foil Edition)

action: Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
misc: Can be activated during either player's turn
